backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles and diary entries with access control checks, storing entries per user and supporting creation and sorted retrieval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented face detection features, associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Collection of short summaries describing the purpose of key frontend files across components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Root stylesheet defining OKLCH‑based color variables for light and dark themes using Tailwind layers.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML document providing the root div and script entry for the frontend app.
frontend/public/models/face-api/INSTALLA: Instructions explaining that face-api.js must be manually installed and added to package.json for face detection to function.
frontend/public/models/face-api/README.m: Documentation for required face-api.js model files, download steps, usage notes, and licensing info.
frontend/public/models/face-api/tiny_fac: Placeholder binary weights file required by the Tiny Face Detector model.
Manifest file for the Tiny Face Detector model describing expected weight tensors.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app setting up routes with authentication guards and wrapping the UI in theme and toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog prompting first‑time users for their name and saving the profile via backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Wrapper that blocks access for unauthenticated users and displays a sign‑in prompt.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main layout with header, footer, auth checks, and conditional profile setup dialog.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on identity and refreshes related queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Provides react-query hooks to fetch and update the current user's profile via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDiaryQueries.ts: Exposes hooks to fetch all diary entries and create new ones, with query invalidation and toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useFaceApiModels.ts: Empty placeholder file for face API model loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Re-exports CSS from the parent index.css.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/EntriesListPage.tsx: Renders searchable list of diary entries with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/EntryCreatePage.tsx: Form page for creating a new diary entry and submitting it via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single diary entry with metadata and loading/error handling.
frontend/src/pages/FaceDetectorPage.tsx: UI page explaining that face detection is unavailable until face-api.js and model files are manually installed. Provides installation steps and links to required resources.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, branding, and a Get Started button that logs in or navigates to entries depending on authentication.
frontend/src/types/face-api.d.ts: Empty placeholder TypeScript declaration file for face-api.js types.
Empty utility file intended for face detection overlay logic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning parameters from hashes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, typography, animations, and plugin usage.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing implemented features, requirements, and the plan to add browser-based face detection.
